company.what_they_do: Jean Martin Inc. (JMI) is a global, minority-owned IT services and consulting firm founded in 1997 and headquartered in New York City (Manhattan). It provides end-to-end technology solutions including software engineering, AI/ML, data analytics, cloud computing, SAP/Dynamics ERP implementation, Salesforce consulting, cybersecurity, financial research and analysis, product development, and business process outsourcing. It serves clients across energy, financial services, government, insurance, telecommunications, pharmaceutical, manufacturing, and retail sectors. JMI operates a hybrid onshore/offshore delivery model with offices in the US, India, Colombia, Japan, and other locations, and has over 2,000–2,500 employees globally.
raw_notes: Founded 1997, HQ: 260 Madison Ave, Floor 8, New York, NY 10016.
Minority-owned business; co-founders Shawn Kumar (CEO) and Ravi Kumar (President).
4 key practice areas: (1) Technology Solutions, (2) Financial Research & Analysis, (3) Data & Analytics, (4) Product Development.

Services include: digital transformation, cloud migration, AI & ML, CRM (Salesforce Partner), ERP (SAP, Microsoft Dynamics/D365), IoT, blockchain, QA automation, cybersecurity, offshore application development, BPO, corporate training.
Over 500 clients served (managed services, SaaS & bespoke projects).
Offshore delivery centers in India, Philippines, Czech Republic, Serbia.
Announced appointment of Kaushik Paul as Chief Revenue Officer in March 2024.
LinkedIn lists 201–500 employees; other sources cite 2,000–2,500 globally.
JMI has an energy management / smart lighting SaaS product offered to utility customers worldwide.
Has a dedicated Salesforce practice (salesforce.jeanmartin.com) and a D365 practice (d365.jeanmartin.com).

Specialties listed on LinkedIn: IT services, CRM, Digital Marketing, Microsoft Dynamics, Mobile app development, Managed services, IT Infrastructure Management, ERP, CPQ, AI, IoT, Cloud, Blockchain, Salesforce, Data Analytics, Data Visualization.

could_not_find: solarnyx.com does NOT appear to be a legitimate company website for Jean Martin or any real business. Multiple authoritative email-verification sources (verifymail.io, usercheck.com, deviceandbrowserinfo.com, abstractapi.com) consistently flag solarnyx.com as a DISPOSABLE / THROWAWAY email domain operated by temporarymail.com, registered via Namecheap with no A records (no real website). This is a significant red flag: the email domain does not match the stated org name 'Jeanmartin' and is not Jean Martin Inc.'s real domain (jeanmartin.com).
No public LinkedIn profile found specifically for 'Marimanickam' at Jean Martin to independently verify current role or seniority beyond The Org listing.
No personal website, publications, or other first-party content found for Marimanickam M.

It is unclear why a Jean Martin employee would sign up using a disposable email domain (solarnyx.com) rather than a @jeanmartin.com address. This mismatch should be flagged for review before outreach.
